sharedRules.description:
If your Army Faction is NURGLETH FOLLOWERS, at the start of the first battle round, select one of the Stages below; until the end of the battle round, that Stage is active for your army. While that Stage is active, each NURGLETH FOLLOWERS unit from your army that has the Endless Cycle ability gains the relevant abilities shown below. At the end of the battle round, the currently active Stage is no longer active, and the other Stage is now active until the end of the following battle round (for example, if you chose the Waxing Stage in the first battle round, the next battle round would be the Waning Stage, then the Waxing Stage again, etc.).

WAXING STAGE
■ Add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in this unit (models that are Battle-shocked or have an unmodified OC characteristic of 0 are not affected).
■ This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

WANING STAGE
■ Models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability or, if that model already has the Feel No Pain 6+ ability, it gains the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.
■ This unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.
sharedRules.name: Endless Cycle

characteristics.$text: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.
characteristics.name: Description

selectionEntries.name: Cultist w/ autopistol and brutal assault weapon

characteristics.$text: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this unit (excluding MONSTER and VEHICLE units): that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.
characteristics.name: Description

selectionEntries.name: Blessed cultist w/ great blighted weapon

characteristics.$text: Each time this unit or an enemy unit ends a move, for each model in this unit that is within 3" of one or more enemy units, select one of those enemy units. That model is destroyed, but instead of rolling for its Deadly Demise ability, roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: When an enemy unit suffers mortal wounds as a result of this unit's Grotesque Explosion ability, after resolving that ability, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test. Each enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per phase.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each time an enemy unit (excluding MONSTER and VEHICLE units) within Engagement Range of this unit is selected to Fall Back, that enemy unit must take a Leadership test, subtracting 2 from the result if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked; if that test is failed, that unit must Remain Stationary this turn.
characteristics.name: Description

selectionEntries.name: Apostle of Rot w/ special weapon

characteristics.$text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target of that attack is an enemy MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: In the Reinforcements step of your Movement phase, you can return up to D3 destroyed models to this unit.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each time an attack targets this unit, that attack does not benefit from the Anti- or [LETHAL HITS] abilities.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each time a melee attack is allocated to a model in this unit, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, roll one D6 (to a maximum of six D6 per attacking unit): for each 4+, the attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: This model has a transport capacity of 12 NURGLETH FOLLOWERS INFANTRY models. Each OGRYN model takes up the space of 3 models. It cannot transport CORPULENT SHAMBLER models.
characteristics.name: Capacity

characteristics.$text: Units can disembark from this TRANSPORT after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While an enemy unit is within Engagement Range of this unit, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that enemy unit (to a minimum of 1).
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: You can target this unit with the Grenade Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already used that Stratagem on a different unit this phase.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Once per battle, you can target this unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each time this unit makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in this unit.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this unit. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly NURGLETH FOLLOWERS model makes an attack that targets that unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: At the start of each player’s Command phase, this model regains up to D3 lost wounds.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with its bileblast cannon. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly NURGLETH FOLLOWERS unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per phase.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While a friendly NURGLE unit (excluding MONSTER or VEHICLE units) is within 12" of this model, improve the Leadership characteristic of that unit by 1.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: This model can move over terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Apostles of Rot
■ Blessed Cultists
■ Cultist Mob
■ Scabs
You can attach this model to a unit, even if one other Leader unit has already been attached to it (you cannot attach more than one of the same leader to the same unit). If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units with their original Starting Strengths.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While this model is leading a unit, that unit has the Benefit of Cover.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While this model is leading a unit, at the start of the Fight phase, enemy units within Engagement Range of that unit must take a Battle-shock test.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: In your Shooting phase, you can select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this unit (excluding units with the Lone Operative ability that are not part of an Attached unit and are not within 12" of this model) and roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
In your Movement phase, you can select one friendly NURGLETH FOLLOWERS unit (excluding VEHICLE units) within 18" of this unit and roll one D6: on a 1, this unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2+, until the start of your next Movement phase:
■ Each time that model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.
■ You can re-roll Charge rolls made for that unit.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ Scabs
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Attacks characteristics of melee weapons equipped by this model by 3.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Apostles of Rot
■ Blessed Cultists
■ Cultist Mob
■ Scabs
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model and roll one D6: on a 2-5, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ Plague Ogryns
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Battle-shock tests and Leadership tests taken for that unit.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model's unit. Until the end of the phase, that unit is not eligible to fight until after every other eligible unit has done so.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Apostles of Rot
■ Blessed Cultists
■ Cultist Mob
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each time a ranged attack targets a NURGLETH FOLLOWERS INFANTRY unit from your army, if that unit is not Below Half-Strength, the target has the Benefit of Cover against that attack. If that unit already has the Benefit of Cover, subtract 1 from the Wound roll instead.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each time a NURGLETH FOLLOWERS unit from your army is selected to fight, if that unit made a Charge move this turn, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit. In addition, each time a NURGLETH FOLLOWERS OGRYN unit from your army makes an Advance or Charge roll, add 1 to the result
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: In your Command phase or at the end of a phase in which they disembarked from a TRANSPORT or were set up on the battlefield, NURGLETH FOLLOWERS CHARACTER models from your army can, unless otherwise specified, issue one Order to a friendly NURGLETH FOLLOWERS INFANTRY or NURGLETH FOLLOWERS MOUNTED unit within 6" of them. Until the start of your next Command phase, the unit you selected is affected by that Order; unless otherwise stated, a unit can only be affected by one Order at a time (any Order subsequently issued to that unit replaces the current one). Orders cannot be issued to Battle-shocked units, and if a unit being affected by an Order becomes Battle-shocked, that Order ceases to affect that unit.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
During the Declare Battle Formations step, select one of the Brews below. Until the end of the battle, while an enemy unit is within Engagement Range of a NURGLETH FOLLOWERS unit from your army, that enemy unit has the effect of your chosen Brew.

SHAKING POX
Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

BLOODROT SEPSIS
Worsen the Save characteristic of models in this unit by 1.

CEREBROFLUX
Worsen the Move, Leadership, and Objective Control characteristics of models in this unit by 1 (this rule can only worsen a model’s Objective Control characteristic to a minimum of 1).
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Improve the Leadership characteristic of the bearer by 1.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While the bearer is leading a unit, that unit has the Scouts 6" ability.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Improve the Toughness characteristic of the bearer by 1.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: After both players have deployed their armies, if the bearer is on the battlefield, select up to three other NURGLETH FOLLOWERS INFANTRY units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: BUBOTYRANT model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, before removing that model, you can select one CHARACTER model within 6" of the bearer and roll one D6: on a 2+, that CHARACTER model suffers D3+3 mortal wounds and, if it is destroyed as a result of those mortal wounds, remove the bearer and set it back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While the bearer is leading a unit, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While the bearer’s unit is within range of an objective marker you control, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each time the bearer issues an Order, it can issue it to an eligible unit up to 12" away.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While the bearer is within 3" of one or more friendly NURGLETH FOLLOWERS VEHICLE units, unless it is leading a unit, it has the Lone Operative ability. In addition, when issuing Orders, it can issue them to friendly NURGLETH FOLLOWERS VEHICLE units.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Once per battle round, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: At the start of the first battle round, select a Brew that is not currently active for your army; until the end of the battle, while an enemy unit is within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit, that enemy unit has the effect of your chosen Brew in addition to the one active for your army.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: In the Battle-shock step of your opponent’s Command phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer's unit must take a Battle-shock test. In addition, if that enemy unit is Below Half-strength, subtract 1 from the result (that unit does not also have to take a Battle-shock test for being Below Half-strength).
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" horizontally of the bearer's unit.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While the bearer is leading a unit, if that unit made a Charge move this turn, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, a Critical Hit is scored on a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each time this unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit and ignore any vertical distance when determining the total distance that model can be moved.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each time this unit is selected to fight, you can roll one D6: on a 1, this unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2-5, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in this unit; on a 6, add D3 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in this unit.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Apostles of Rot
■ Blessed Cultists
■ Cultist Mob
■ Scabs
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While this model is leading a unit, add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return 1 destroyed Bodyguard model to that unit with its full wounds remaining. If that unit is a SCABS unit, you can return up to D3 destroyed Bodyguard models instead or, if that unit is a BATTLELINE unit, you can return up to D3+3 destroyed Bodyguard models instead.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
Q. How does Malachi's "Honeyed Words" ability work with effects such as the Counter-offensive Stratagem or Fights First?
A. The ability specifies that a unit is not eligible to fight; as the Stratagem states that "your unit fights next" with no regard to eligibility, it works regardless of the ability, whereas Fights First states that "units with this ability that are eligible to fight do so in the Fights First step"; therefore, they are affected by the ability.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
**Strategic Ploy**
**1CP**
**When:** Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
**Target:** One NURGLETH FOLLOWERS INFANTRY or NURGLETH FOLLOWERS MOUNTED unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
**Effect:** After the attacking unit has fought, roll one D6 for each model from your unit that was destroyed as a result of those attacks: on a 4+, the attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds per phase).
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
**Battle Tactic**
**1CP**
**When:** Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
**Target:** One NURGLETH FOLLOWERS INFANTRY or NURGLETH FOLLOWERS MOUNTED unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
**Effect:** Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
**Epic Deed**
**2CP**
**When:** Any phase.
**Target:** One BLESSED CULTISTS or CULTIST MOB unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
**Effect:** Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Strategic Reserves, at its Starting Strength.
**Restrictions:** Any destroyed CHARACTER units that were attached to your unit are not returned. You can only use this Stratagem once per battle.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
**Battle Tactic**
**1CP**
**When:** Fight phase.
**Target:** One NURGLETH FOLLOWERS INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase and is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
**Effect:** Until the end of the phase, each time your unit is selected to fight, when determining which models in your unit are eligible to fight, any models in your unit that are within 3" of one or more enemy models are eligible to fight. When resolving those attacks, such models can target one of those enemy units that is within 3" of them and within Engagement Range of their unit.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
**Battle Tactic**
**1CP**
**When:** Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
**Target:** One NURGLETH FOLLOWERS INFANTRY or NURGLETH FOLLOWERS MOUNTED unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
**Effect:** Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
**Battle Tactic**
**1CP**
**When:** Fight phase.
**Target:** One NURGLETH FOLLOWERS INFANTRY unit from your army.
**Effect:** Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
**Battle Tactic**
**1CP**
**When:** Your Shooting phase.
**Target:** One NURGLETH FOLLOWERS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
**Effect:** Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets the closest eligible target, add 1 to the Hit roll.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
**Battle Tactic**
**2CP**
**When:** Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
**Target:** One NURGLETH FOLLOWERS OGRYN unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
**Effect:** Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
**Battle Tactic**
**1CP**
**When:** Fight phase
**Target:**  One NURGLETH FOLLOWERS OGRYN unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
**Effect:** Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [HAZARDOUS] ability, and each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack, improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that attack by 1
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
**Strategic Ploy**
**1/2CP***
**When:** Any phase.
**Target:**  One NURGLETH FOLLOWERS VEHICLE or NURGLETH FOLLOWERS MONSTER model from your army with the Deadly Demise ability that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
**Effect:** Do not roll one D6 to determine whether mortal wounds are inflicted by your model’s Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted.
**Restrictions:** *When selecting a TITANIC model for this Stratagem, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
**Strategic Ploy**
**1CP**
**When:** End of the Fight phase.
**Target:**  One NURGLETH FOLLOWERS unit from your army that has destroyed one or more enemy units this phase.
**Effect:** Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6". When doing so, your unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT) and can be moved within Engagement Range of that unit.
**Restrictions:** You cannot select a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
**Strategic Ploy**
**1CP**
**When:**  Your Movement phase.
**Target:** One NURGLETH FOLLOWERS unit from your army.
**Effect:** Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit; if your unit is an OGRYN unit, add 7" to the Move characteristic instead.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
**Battle Tactic**
**2CP**
**When:** Your Shooting phase.
**Target:** One NURGLETH FOLLOWERS VEHICLE unit from your army, and one enemy MONSTER or VEHICLE unit visible to that unit.
**Effect:** For each model in that unit, select one ranged weapon that model is equipped with; until the end of the phase, each time an attack made with that weapon targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll, Wound roll and Damage roll.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
**Strategic Ploy**
**1CP**
**When:** Start of your Command phase.
**Target:** One NURGLETH FOLLOWERS CHARACTER model on the battlefield.
**Effect:** Until the end of the phase, your model can issue two Orders.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
**Battle Tactic**
**1CP**
**When:** Your Shooting phase.
**Target:** One NURGLETH FOLLOWERS INFANTRY unit and one NURGLETH FOLLOWERS VEHICLE unit from your army that have not been selected to shoot this phase, and one enemy unit visible to those units.
**Effect:** Until the end of the phase, each time your selected INFANTRY and VEHICLE units make an attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
**Strategic Ploy**
**1CP**
**When:** Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.
**Target:** One NURGLETH FOLLOWERS unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge.
**Effect:** Until the end of the phase, subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that enemy unit.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
**Strategic Ploy**
**1CP**
**When:** Your Movement phase.
**Target:** One NURGLETH FOLLOWERS unit from your army.
**Effect:** If the Waxing Stage is currently active for your army, until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced; if the Waning Stage is currently active for your army, until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
**Epic Deed**
**1CP**
**When:** Start of the Fight phase.
**Target:** One NURGLETH FOLLOWERS unit from your army that is below its Starting Strength.
**Effect:** Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
**Battle Tactic**
**1CP**
**When:**  Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
**Target:** One NURGLETH FOLLOWERS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
**Effect:** Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play; the destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
**Strategic Ploy**
**1CP**
**When:**  End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
**Target:** One NURGLETH FOLLOWERS INFANTRY or NURGLETH FOLLOWERS MOUNTED unit from your army that is wholly within 9" of a battlefield edge and is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
**Effect:** Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
**Epic Deed**
**2CP**
**When:**  Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
**Target:** One NURGLETH FOLLOWERS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
**Effect:** Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
**Strategic Ploy**
**1CP**
**When:** Command phase.
**Target:** One NURGLETH FOLLOWERS INFANTRY or NURGLETH FOLLOWERS MOUNTED unit from your army.
**Effect:** Until the end of the battle round, your unit benefits from both the Waxing Stage and Waning Stage abilities.
**Restrictions:** This Stratagem can only be used once per battle round.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
**Battle Tactic**
**1CP**
**When:**  Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
**Target:** One NURGLETH FOLLOWERS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
**Effect:** Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If that enemy unit is within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
**Strategic Ploy**
**1CP**
**When:** Your Shooting phase.
**Target:**  One NURGLETH FOLLOWERS unit from your army that made an Advance move this turn.
**Effect:** Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in this unit by 1.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Add 3" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Improve the Weapon Skill characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While this model has 1-8 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from its Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
characteristics.name: Description
